reviews.comment:
Atención NEFASTA! ME NEGARON UN POCO DE AGUA PARA TOMAR. EN SUS CARTELES DICE QUE ABRE A LAS 7HS DE LA MAÑANA, SON 7:30HS Y SEGUIMOS ESPERANDO!!  Es la única estación que hay!!
Puse una estrella por poner algo.

(Translated by Google)
Attention! Horrid! They refused me some water to drink. Their signs say they open at 7 a.m., but it's 7:30 a.m. and we're still waiting! It's the only station there!
I gave it one star for the sake of it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocnBhSkZBEAE
